meaning: vt.结结巴巴地讲vi.连续发溅泼声,说话结巴n.泼溅
examples: Exactly how far along the wall was the blood splatter?
Superior wetting performance with lower flux splatter.
To add depth to the splatter, first place one normal splatter on one layer.
The Volcker plan is nothing more than a horror-film sequel that will splatter on hapless taxpayers.
He shows a light brown ball with a splatter of raised quill marks.
